summary: Tested backend wake system implementation: GET /api/health returns {ok:true}, App loads without technical messages, Wake screen shows only 'Philos' brand text, Auth runs after backend ready, Action Flow completes full cycle, Feed/Profile/Navigation all working. 11/12 backend tests passed, all frontend tests passed.

minor.issue: Returns 200 with success=false when no token provided instead of 401. Not a breaking issue but inconsistent with REST standards.

critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/health endpoint correctly returns {ok: true} (server.py line 92-93)
BackendReadyProvider correctly implements silent ping every 2.5s with 4s timeout (useBackendReady.js)
App.js properly wraps AppInner with BackendReadyProvider and gates auth check on isReady
Wake screen (data-testid='app-wake-screen') shows only 'Philos' text with subtle pulse animation - no spinners or technical messages
ActionFlow uses enqueue() fallback when backend not ready (line 127-129)
Auth check waits for isReady before calling /api/auth/me
localStorage token/user restored on reload if valid
seed_data_creation: Created test action: TEST_iteration101_action via Action Flow
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend wake system fully implemented and working. Health endpoint /api/health returns {ok:true}. BackendReadyProvider in hooks/useBackendReady.js manages silent backend wake with 2.5s ping interval. Wake screen uses data-testid='app-wake-screen' and shows only 'Philos' brand. All Action Flow steps work: Need→Choice→Action→Reaction→Result→Reward. Feed, Profile, and Navigation all working correctly.

features_verified.Auth check runs after backend ready: PASS - isReady gate in App.js line 41
